name: Hermes (OSP)
description:
In Greek mythology, Hermes (Ancient Greek: Ἑρμῆς, Hermḗs) is the ancient Greek god of roads, journeys, travelers, shepherds, athletes, messengers, merchants, trade, commerce, thieves, and trickery; the messenger of the gods, a psychopomp (meaning it's his job to lead the souls of the dead to the Underworld), and a member of the twelve Olympians.

His Roman equivalent is the god Mercury.
creator: Elenkaiser G
